rationale: The query's engine is a linear-stability/Turing-bifurcation analysis of a reaction-diffusion (activator-inhibitor) system on a network, decomposing perturbations onto graph-Laplacian eigenmodes to get a degree-dependent instability threshold and hysteresis; the candidate instead uses a percolation-style cascading-failure model with a generating-function analytical framework, deriving a critical average degree for network collapse and degree-distribution effects on robustness. These share surface vocabulary (network, degree, threshold, robustness, coexisting/collapsed states) but not the underlying machinery — no reaction-diffusion dynamics or Laplacian eigenmode stability analysis appears in the candidate, so method_coherence is false. The candidate's object is cascading failure between interdependent infrastructure/engineering-medical-societal networks, genuinely different from the query's biological/ecological activator-inhibitor pattern-forming networks, so object_difference is true.
